nasb.text: They shall spread over them a cloth of scarlet material, and cover the same with a covering of porpoise skin, and they shall insert its poles.

esv.text: Then they shall spread over them a cloth of scarlet and cover the same with a covering of goatskin, and shall put in its poles.

cnv.text: 在這些物件上面，他們要鋪上朱紅色布，再蓋上海狗皮罩，然後把槓穿上。

ccb.text: 这些东西上面要盖朱红色的布，再盖上海狗皮，然后穿上抬桌子的横杠。
